# Congratulations! LEADS University Islamabad Campus is Now Officially HEC NOC Approved

**A Proud Milestone for LEADS University!**

Alhamdulillah! Our Islamabad Campus is now **officially HEC NOC Approved**, marking the beginning of an exciting new chapter. Admissions are now open—join us and be part of a future built on excellence.

#LEADSUniversity #IslamabadCampus #HECApproved #AdmissionsOpen #HigherEducation

![](https://leads.edu.pk/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/720905870_17892591816506607_5123310187455768532_n.jpg-1-240x300.jpeg)
